message:
refactor(codegen): Use listContains helper in keyword_mod.zig

Simplified iskeyword and issoftkeyword from 15 lines of manual
codegen to 2 clean declarations using the new listContains helper.

Before:
- 15 lines with manual ID generation, emit calls, and label management

After:
- 2 lines using h.listContains()

Verified with comprehensive keyword tests - all passing.
